input_text: A kitchen door was open. Daniel journeyed to the hallway. Mary's leg is clean. Young elephants are not big. The picture was painted by Leo. Penguins happily live in cold water. Sheep are afraid of mice. The letter was written. John has three nice cars. Americans cannot disappear. If X1 is a father of Y1, Y1 is a child of X1. The city was destroyed. The street is in Tallinn. The hand of a man moved a wheel. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. The stone was heavy. The ball was kicked by Mike. How many nice cars does John have?

nl_proof: (2) How many nice cars does John have?
(1) If the number of good cars John has is E1 then some E1 is the answer  [sentence 2]
(2) The number of good cars John has is 3  [sentence 1]
(3) If some X equals 3 then X is the answer  [from steps 1, 2]
